description: Open the sample scene 'dwanko_run.tnz' and configure a hard camera cut at Frame 13. The first 12 frames must be a static wide shot, and frames 13-24 must be a static close-up (at least 200% zoom centered on the character) with an instantaneous transition. Render frames 1-24 as a PNG sequence to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/camera_cut/.
